description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that triggers on push to the master branch. For a specific repository owner, set up .NET Core 3.1 and 5.0, Node.js 10.x, then test and generate a coverage report. Publish documentation, deploy to GitHub Pages and Github.io, package a nightly NuGet package, publish it to NuGet, sync to Gitee, and purge jsDeliver CDN.
